name: Acetyl-CoAcarbon-dioxide ligase (ADP-forming)
mechanism: blocks first committed/rate-limiting FAS step -> frees acetyl-CoA for PHB
label: RPA0071 · Acetyl-CoAcarbon-dioxide  «accA»

name: acetyl-CoAphosphate acetyltransferase
mechanism: raises acetyl-CoA/CoA ratio; 'key factor' for PHB (upstream overflow valve)
label: RPA4567 · acetyl-CoAphosphate acet  «pta»

name: 3-Carboxy-1-hydroxypropyl-ThPPlipoamde
mechanism: blocks 2-OG->succinyl-CoA; diverts to glutamate (N mimic) + cuts TCA drain
label: RPA0189 · 3-Carboxy-1-hydroxypropy  «sucA»

name: IsocitrateNADP+ oxidoreductase (decarboxylating)
mechanism: partial KD slows oxidative TCA + lowers 2-OG (secondary N-starve mimic)
label: RPA3834 · IsocitrateNADP+ oxidored  «icd»

name: PHB depolymerase
mechanism: KD blocks PHB remobilization -> raises net granule accumulation (titer, not flux)
citation: Kobayashi 2019 (R. sphaeroides phaZ del -> 2.9x PHB); Jendrossek 2002
label: phaZ (RPA1786 *) · PHB depolymerase

name: Citrate oxaloacetate-lyase ((pro-3S)-CH2COO- - acetyl-CoA)
mechanism: KD of first committed TCA step raises cytoplasmic acetyl-CoA for PhaA (partial only)
label: gltA (RPA2907) · Citrate synthase (TC

name: PII nitrogen sensor (GlnB1)
mechanism: PII sensor; one of 3 redundant paralogs (GlnB/GlnK1/GlnK2) that buffer each other
label: glnB (RPA0454 *) · PII nitrogen sensor

name: Histidine kinase NtrB (N two-component)
mechanism: NtrB kinase; signals through the same NtrC regulon N-starvation triggers (indirect)
label: ntrB (RPA1711 *) · Histidine kinase Ntr

name: PHB granule transcriptional repressor
mechanism: derepresses phaC/phaA/phaB; but also derepresses phaZ depolymerase (mixed)
label: phaR (RPA1795 *) · PHB granule transcri

name: PII-like nitrogen sensor (GlnK)
mechanism: GlnB paralog; GlnK1 predominates under N-excess; redundant PII sensor
label: glnK (RPA0584 *) · PII-like nitrogen se

name: Succinate(acceptor) oxidoreductase
mechanism: KD slows succinate->fumarate; shunts carbon to PHB as alt electron sink
label: sdhA (RPA0216 (+3 isoz)) · Succinate dehydrogen

name: isocitrate hydro-lyase
mechanism: citrate->isocitrate; slows TCA cycling; synergistic with gltA KD
label: acnA (RPA0202) · Aconitase A (TCA)

name: Redox-sensing histidine kinase RegB
mechanism: global redox two-component regulator (>50 targets); pleiotropic, high-risk
label: regB (RPA3332 *) · Redox-sensing histid

name: 2-Methylcitrate oxaloacetate-lyase
mechanism: diverts propionyl-CoA (from aromatic catabolism) to methylcitrate; KD retains CoA
label: prpC (RPA2394) · 2-Methylcitrate synt

name: Orthophosphateoxaloacetate carboxyl-lyase (phosphorylating)
mechanism: diverts PEP to OAA; partial KD slightly raises acetyl-CoA (modest)
label: ppc (RPA1772) · PEP carboxylase (ana

name: (S)-Malate hydro-lyase
mechanism: fumarate->malate; cuts downstream TCA flux + NADH
label: fumC (RPA1329 (+2 isoz)) · Fumarate hydratase C

name: Nitrogenase transcriptional activator
mechanism: nitrogenase activator; relevant only under diazotrophic (N2-fixing) growth
label: nifA (RPA4630 *) · Nitrogenase transcri

name: (S)-malateNAD+ oxidoreductase
mechanism: malate->OAA; slightly reduces OAA+acetyl-CoA condensation (less citrate)
label: mdh (RPA0192) · Malate dehydrogenase
